case_title: LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES VS. GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA GEORGIOU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES SERVED JUN-16-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA GEORGIOU

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA GEORGIOU $33,902.35 PRINCIPAL, $2,667.76 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,862.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
